message.content:
@startuml
actor User

participant "SearchWindowUI" as SWU
participant "SearchOnAnotherInstanceController" as SOAIC
participant "NetworkFactory" as NF
participant "UDP_ClientImpl" as UDP
participant "Thread" as T
participant "TCP_ClientImpl" as TCP
participant "SpreadCheet" as SC
participant "UDP_ClientImpl_03" as UDP03
participant "TCP_ClientImpl_03" as TCP03
participant "SearchWindowController" as SWC

User -> SWU : start searching instances
SWU -> SOAIC : create(address)
SOAIC -> NF : Obj = getUDPClientImpl(availableInstances)
NF -> SWC : create()
NF -> T : create(obj)
NF -> T : start()
NF -> T : join()
User -> SOAIC : checkIfIsAvailable()
SOAIC -> NF : getInfo(destination)
NF -> SWC : create()
SOAIC -> UDP03 : create(Object)
SOAIC -> UDP03 : start()
SOAIC -> UDP03 : getInfo()
TCP03 -> UDP03 : getInfo()
UDP03 -> NF : join()

@enduml
